# AGENTS.md

## Project Overview
Test project for unit tests.

## Agent Rules
- Follow test conventions.

## External Memory

- Memory Repo: git@github.com:testorg/test-memory.git
- Local Path: ../test-memory
- Default Branch: main
- Mode: direct

### Required Reads

- project-brief.md
- active-context.md
- decisions.md

### Update Triggers

- start of work
- architecture decisions

### Commit Policy

- memory: update after <task>

### Forbidden Actions

- Delete historical files
